inline.text: Your ward has 24 patients today. Torres (4B) needs immediate attention -- blood pressure trending since early morning.
Sarah K. remains stable in the ICU post-op. Four procedures begin at 09:00 in OR 2. The 14:00 slot has a scheduling conflict in OR 3.
Three labs remain pending: a rush CBC for Torres, a routine lipid screen for Martinez, and an echo for Williams.
Bed 12 discharge is cleared for this morning. Bed 7 (Nguyen) needs groin site check at 08:00 post-cardiac cath.
Staffing: RN Collins called in sick. Float pool replacement arriving at 07:30. 2 admissions expected from ED.
